message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title **Discovery**

actor Client
participant "➜ Alias" as Alias

Client -> Alias : HEAD
Client <-- Alias : 307 Temporary Redirect / 308 Permanent Redirect

note left
<#lightgreen>
|= Header |= Value |
| Profile | <http://level3.rest/profiles/alias>,\n<target-profile> |
| Allow | //target's Allow values// |
| Location | //target URL// |
end note

@enduml
```
